scope: EN / global Binance Gold Page only

sources.title: Binance — Referral / Sign-Up Rewards Landing (CRYPTOBONW)
sources.riskNotes: Affiliate landing — IMMUTABLE URL (ROLE 0 only). 19,800 is a task-based ceiling, not a guaranteed grant. Landing displays 'USD' as marketing label while reward denomination is USDT — do not mix USD/USDT inside one caption.

sources.title: Binance — Referral Bonus Program
sources.riskNotes: Generic program page shows tiered referral rewards (100/1,000 USD type) that are NOT the CBW 19,800 USDT partner offer; use the referral landing for the partner offer.

sources.title: Binance — Trading Fee Schedule
sources.riskNotes: Standard tier rates; effective rates vary by VIP tier and BNB discount. Do not claim 'lowest fees'.

sources.title: Binance — Proof of Reserves
sources.riskNotes: PoR proves reserve inclusion via Merkle tree; it does NOT prove solvency or eliminate counterparty risk.

sources.title: Binance — P2P Trading Marketplace
sources.riskNotes: Listing UI and payment methods are geo-routed; a USD/USDT view supports an interface claim only, not universal availability.

sources.title: Binance — Identity Verification Guide
sources.riskNotes: Tier names/limits change; authenticated KYC screenshots require crop/blur + ROLE 33 + ROLE 0 before any public use.

sources.title: Binance — USDⓈ-M Futures
sources.riskNotes: 125× is a maximum on select pairs; most pairs are capped lower. High-leverage risk must be stated.

sources.title: Binance — Terms of Use
sources.riskNotes: Legal terms govern bonus eligibility and account requirements; subject to change.

sources.title: Binance — Restricted Countries & Regions
sources.riskNotes: Authoritative for restriction claims; re-check before publishing any country-level claim.

sources.title: CoinGecko — Binance exchange data
sources.riskNotes: Point-in-time market data (trust score 10/10 rank #2, 24h volume ~$8.31B). Re-pull weekly; values drift.

sources.title: CoinMarketCap — Binance exchange data
sources.riskNotes: Aggregator snapshot used to corroborate volume/pairs; point-in-time.

sources.title: Binance iOS App — App Store
sources.riskNotes: App availability is store/region dependent (may be absent in US/UK stores).

sources.title: Binance Android App — Google Play
sources.riskNotes: App availability is store/region dependent.

sources.title: Binance — Security Breach Update (official announcement, May 7 2019)
sources.riskNotes: Supports historical 2019 incident / SAFU handling. Must not be used to imply Binance is risk-free or that future reimbursements are guaranteed. Canonical official Binance support announcement (article 360028031711, published 2019-05-07 by CZ; 7,000 BTC hot-wallet breach covered in full by the SAFU fund); verified 2026-06-08. Replaces a prior corrupted blog URL that contained an anomalous 'interpersonal' token.

sources.title: Manual capture — Binance referral landing (19,800 USDT signup reward)
sources.riskNotes: Owner-approved public capture. Shows 19,800 USD marketing label; caption must use the evidence-verified USDT denomination and not mix USD/USDT.

sources.title: Manual capture — Binance registration/referral demo state (CRYPTOBONW)
sources.riskNotes: Owner-approved 2026-06-06. Email field empty, form not submitted, no PII. Shows CRYPTOBONW attribution.

sources.title: Manual capture — Binance fee schedule
sources.riskNotes: Public fee page capture; re-verify rates against live page on each refresh.

sources.title: Manual capture — Binance Proof of Reserves page
sources.riskNotes: Public PoR page capture; supports 'publishes PoR' claim only, not a solvency guarantee.

sources.title: Manual capture — Binance spot trading interface
sources.riskNotes: Public spot UI capture; interface evidence only, not availability-everywhere evidence.

sources.title: Binance — Buy Crypto (Fiat/P2P) Support / C2C Help Hub
sources.riskNotes: Verified LIVE official Binance support hub (C2C / Buy Crypto Fiat-P2P category) on 2026-06-08. HUB-LEVEL ONLY: it does NOT itself display the explicit P2P platform-fee figure or the escrow how-it-works text — the specific deep articles are ID-based and were 404 / JS-gated to automated fetch (binance fee schedule pages are spot-only; p2p.binance.com is JS-gated). Fee terms can change; local availability and payment methods vary by region; escrow reduces but does NOT eliminate counterparty risk; users must follow Binance rules and avoid off-platform payments. Claims using this source are held at active_review pending a human-pinned specific official P2P fee/escrow article (P0 upgrade).
